name: Synovus Financial Corp. 5.875% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series E
summary: Synovus Financial Corp. 5.875% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series E is a series of preferred stock issued by Synovus Financial Corporation. It pays a fixed dividend rate of 5.875% until a certain date, after which the rate resets based on market conditions. The preferred stock is non-cumulative, meaning any unpaid dividends are not carried over to future periods.
